reviews.review_description: Not working. Tried to launch anatomy, stuck at pinwheel 1/3.

My game exploded
10/10

This software, once paid for, is fantastic for an Academic class. I'm using it for my A&P course, and it is very sophisticated, and meets my needs for a lab. People giving it a bad review are doing so because they expect this to be free...but this is only meant for professional/academic use.

I downloaded this for my wife so she could look at particular areas (mainly the heart, lungs, and stomach), but when you log in as a guest, you really can't do anything?  We are not a university/college or taking any tests, she just wants to look, read the info, etc.  But it seems you can't without paying a lot.
Definitely not free.

This would be a good app if you were able to open and look at The anatomy but you can’t open anything without probably paying!! Really hate apps that tell you they’re free Only to install them and find out they are useless, unless you pay!

reviews.review_title: If you want to sell then sell app
reviews.review_description: Dont make it download for free?? If you make it for sell ... at first i really thankyou that ypu make it for free .. but only skeleton

I've gone on to the Web site to try and obtain a license code, it asked me to sign in with Facebook, Google or email, I selected Facebook, then it came up with a red banner saying sign in failed, then asked me to use my email and password. Plus it says I must allow notifications. If that's not a phishing scam I don't know what is. You've been warned.

developer_response.body:
Hello shaunsid, thank you for getting in touch. 3D Organon is a multi-awarded medical anatomy platform for teaching and learning anatomy across VR, AR, MR, desktop, and mobile devices. The 2021 Enterprise edition of 3D Organon includes new 3D models (reaching over 10.000 anatomical structures), new and more detailed skeleton and heart, 3D painting, bone mapping of anatomical landmarks, sectioning tool, pain effects, bony spurs, tumor growth and new languages. 
The “Guest” access to the software includes the skeletal and connective tissue systems. These two body systems are free for ever, including the skeletal system animations! 
You are more than welcome to request a trial and further explore the new 2021 Edition. Check our website. Subscription upgrades are available too. For more detailed instructions on using 3D Organon you can download the User Manual for Standalone VR devices from our knowledge base: https://www.3dorganon.com/knowledge-base/. If you need more information please contact us at prosupport@3dorganon.com. We are always happy to help out.

reviews.review_description: I can only access the skeleton section, other body options not available so ineffective.

This app I very good to use accurate and reasonably easy,  but the price outways the benifits. 199 usd a year. Therefore chainged to Human Anatomy VR which is actually superior, as you can use hand tracking, to this app with a price tag of 29 usd student price.

As a quest 3 user this application is only affordable for the vast minority. As a marketer who works closely on digital product pricing it's my personal opinion that this application is not intelligently priced. Most lay persons and students do not have $170 to spend per year but billed at once, not on the application per se, but on the extra level of detail this application provides over its competitors. Realistically this tool is being used by doctors and professors, perhaps the curious well off. However this pricing strategy is really missing the forest for the trees as is demonstrated by the innumerable software firms implementing monthly pricing options with a discounted year long option (think HubSpot). The pricing of this product may well be what stops it from becoming a household name. Seeing how many upset reviews there are here, I daren't even guess at how many gym rats, homeschoolers, illness sufferer's and their loved ones have passed up on this product and taken their money elsewhere. Monthly subscription at say, a 10% premium, is really a no brainer for this product, or maybe they just don't want the extra money. I still think the product would likely not be optimally priced and that a lower price would sweep up a large enough market to bring in a greater amount of money (which is, afterall, the advantage of digital products), but unlike my previous assertion, that is something I can't say with absolute certainty unfortunately.

Really the best and helpful for all students and doctors..
I advise all medical students and doctors to register in this app ..
Thanks 😊 for the best medical VR program in the world 🌎..

only the skeleton is available.
do you have to pay per section?

developer_response.body:
Hello ReneQuest2, thank you for getting in touch. 3D Organon is a multi-awarded medical anatomy platform for teaching and learning anatomy across VR, AR, MR, desktop, and mobile devices. The 2021 Enterprise edition of 3D Organon includes new 3D models (reaching over 10.000 anatomical structures), new and more detailed skeleton and heart, 3D painting, bone mapping of anatomical landmarks, sectioning tool, pain effects, bony spurs, tumor growth and new languages. 
The “Guest” access to the software includes the skeletal and connective tissue systems. These two body systems are free for ever, including the skeletal system animations! 
We currently offer 2 subscription options, the Standard and Premium. The Standard version doesn’t include the interactive quiz mode, cadaveric images and the possibility to create a virtual room (multi-user and cross-platform support). For more details about features and prices please visit our online store here: https://store.3dorganon.com/27-vr-anatomy
You are more than welcome to request a trial and further explore the new 2021 Edition. Check our website. Subscription upgrades are available too. For more detailed instructions on using 3D Organon you can download the User Manual for Standalone VR devices from our knowledge base: https://www.3dorganon.com/knowledge-base/. If you need more information please contact us at prosupport@3dorganon.com. We are always happy to help out.

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded it expecting it to be free but it’s not plus your only limited to skeleton views..
This is a groundbreaking app that has limitless potential… I would suggest u allow guest to view everything the app has to offer for a short period just so they can see the value… Once other developers put out another app such as this for a cheaper price beat believe this app will be left on the shelf !!! So it would be wise to appeal to average non student as well as the medical community….asap!
Waste of time unless you want to pay crazy amounts. It’s cheaper to buy a book
Down loaded from app lab and can only sign in as a quest. Do you need a medical license to be able to get the app.

I was very impressed with the level of fidelity and interactivity of the model, as well as all the supportive material. I'm interested playing with it more to see if there is more functionality with interacting with the model. I would like to zoom in and out or reposition the model so, say, the knee is at eye level. Can't wait to keep exploring and possibly unlocking the extra features like muscles and nerves! Well done!

developer_response.body:
Dear danjodon, the team here at 3D Organon is thrilled to hear such good feedback, and we’re proud to be one of the Best Software Solutions in 3D & VR Anatomy. The 2021 edition of 3D Organon includes new 3D models (reaching over 10.000 anatomical structures), new and more detailed skeleton and heart, 3D painting, bone mapping of anatomical landmarks, sectioning tool, pain effects, bony spurs, tumor growth, and new languages.
Also the controllers are really easy to use! One controller serves for model rotation across the vertical and horizontal axises and the other controller serves for panning and scaling the model. All you have to do is to first move the thumbstick to the left, right, up or down and then press it.
For more details about features and prices please visit our online store here: https://store.3dorganon.com/27-vr-anatomy You are more than welcome to request a trial and further explore the new 2021 Edition. For more detailed instructions on using 3D Organon you can download the User Manual for Standalone VR devices from our knowledge base: https://www.3dorganon.com/knowledge-base/. If you need more information please contact us at prosupport@3dorganon.com. We are always happy to help out.

reviews.review_description: I previously gave this app the highest rating possible. Worked great, even though minimal substance and limited scope. After the latest update, it will not go past signin and exits on its own. Very disappointing.

Overall 6/10 only because the detail is good on the small amount we actually get to view
